response.justification: Candidate has strong senior-level experience and excellent software craftsmanship fundamentals, but is a poor fit for this role. C++ experience is minimal (6 months in 2014-15) and severely outdated; the last 11 years focus on JavaScript/TypeScript web development. No demonstrated capital markets, fixed income, or derivatives experience; the vague RIDE Capital role provides no evidence of domain expertise. The job requires 5-10 years of current, hands-on C++ and Windows development in capital markets—this candidate's profile is the opposite.
strengths: 15+ years professional development experience with demonstrated senior-level expertise and architectural thinking
Proven mastery of software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and code quality; strong mentor and communicator
Some C++ and Java background with low-latency systems work (Dunnhumby), plus SQL and database exposure
concerns: C++ experience is only 6 months in 2014-15 and entirely outdated; last 11 years exclusively JavaScript/TypeScript and web technologies
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking; RIDE Capital role description is vague and tech-stack focused
Background emphasizes web/Linux/open-source platforms, not Windows systems; currently on caregiving career break since October 2025

key_factors.factor: Capital markets or fixed income domain knowledge
